query:
-- Team Channels for group chats
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS team_channels (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  created_by INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Channel Messages
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS channel_messages (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  channel_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (channel_id) REFERENCES team_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Channel Members
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS channel_members (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  channel_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  joined_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (channel_id) REFERENCES team_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_channel_member (channel_id, user_id)
);

-- Personal Development Records
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS development_records (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  record_type ENUM('skill_assessment', 'performance_note', 'milestone', 'goal') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  added_by INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (added_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Add ranking field to users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ranking ENUM('probationary', 'standard', 'high_performer', 'trusted') DEFAULT 'standard';

-- Meeting Requests (team-initiated)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meeting_requests (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  requested_by INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  requested_date DATETIME NOT NULL,
  duration_minutes INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  reviewed_by INT,
  reviewed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  admin_notes TEXT,
  session_id INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (requested_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (reviewed_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

-- Meeting Request Participants
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meeting_request_participants (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  meeting_request_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (meeting_request_id) REFERENCES meeting_requests(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Personal Development Records
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS development_records (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  record_type ENUM('skill_assessment', 'performance_note', 'milestone', 'goal') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  added_by INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (added_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Add ranking field to users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ranking ENUM('probationary', 'standard', 'high_performer', 'trusted') DEFAULT 'standard';

-- Meeting Requests (team-initiated)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meeting_requests (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  requested_by INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  requested_date DATETIME NOT NULL,
  duration_minutes INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  reviewed_by INT,
  reviewed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  admin_notes TEXT,
  session_id INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (requested_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (reviewed_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

-- Meeting Request Participants
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meeting_request_participants (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  meeting_request_id INT NOT NULL,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (meeting_request_id) REFERENCES meeting_requests(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
